landing.title:
Luis Espinoza
IA-Driven Product Engineer
landing.message: AI-Driven Product Engineer with 5+ years building scalable mobile and web applications that impact millions of end users and finance teams across 500+ companies in LATAM. Specialized in React Native and TypeScript, I ship production features for FinTech products like Mendel and Pago Facil, and I use Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot and Warp to create agents, skills and workflows that accelerate delivery without compromising quality.

impact.label: Companies operating on Mendel
impact.description: Mendel serves more than 500 companies across Argentina, Mexico, Colombia and Chile.

launches.label: Downloads on FinTech apps
launches.description: Contributed to Pago Facil development with 500K monthly active users on iOS and Android.

leadership.label: Developer enablement
leadership.description: I build agents, skills and commands with Claude Code to speed up scaffolding, reviews, testing and releases.

stack.title: Stack & AI Arsenal
stack.description: React Native, TypeScript, Firebase, AWS, Redux powered by AI acceleration: Cursor for intelligent refactoring, Claude Code for context-aware suggestions, Codex for complex problem-solving, GitHub Copilot for rapid prototyping, and Warp for terminal efficiency. Clean Architecture patterns ensure every line ships with confidence.

product.title: Mobile development for FinTech
product.description: I build React Native apps for spend management, cards, budgets and corporate travel with complex integrations and performance in mind.

delivery.title: AI-Powered Development Velocity
delivery.description: I integrate Claude Code, Codex, Copilot and Warp into concrete workflows so teams ship faster without sacrificing quality or architecture.

partnership.title: Technical collaboration
partnership.description: I work with product, design, backend and QA to turn complex requirements into clear, secure and maintainable experiences.

skills.title: SKILLS
skills.intro: I do not optimize for tool accumulation. I optimize for production software: understand the business rules, design an architecture that can hold, and ship steadily with product, design, backend and QA.

mentoring.label: workflows that speed up delivery without lowering the bar

product.title: Problem first
product.description: I start with business context, risk and UX before choosing the technical solution.
product.bullets: Translate complex FinTech, operations and consumer requirements into flows that feel clear and safe.|Prioritize decisions that improve adoption, reliability and maintainability, not just implementation speed.|Work comfortably across product, design, backend and QA to land difficult rules without noise.

engineering.title: Architecture that holds
engineering.description: I design technical foundations that survive real product evolution and multi-brand complexity.
engineering.bullets: Build React Native and web apps with TypeScript, clear separation of concerns and a focus on scale.|Work across multi-brand architectures, complex integrations, auth, payments, notifications and real-time data.|Use Clean Architecture and explicit conventions so the code stays readable as the product grows.

enablement.title: Delivery with cadence
enablement.description: I use AI as an operational lever to ship better, not as a cosmetic speed boost.
enablement.bullets: Design agents, commands and automations for scaffolding, review, testing and release workflows.|Speed up repetitive work while keeping technical judgment, traceability and quality control intact.|Aim for improvements that outlast me by leaving reusable processes for the team.

quote.text: Speed matters, but speed without structure only moves the problems earlier. My job is to help product and team gain sustainable traction.
quote.author: Working philosophy

ethos.title: ETHOS
ethos.intro: I care about building software with judgment. In FinTech that means understanding the rules, reducing ambiguity and making technical decisions that are still good when the system grows.

media.label: Curiosity in practice
media.caption: Philosophy, systems and product as training for better thinking under complexity.
media.alt: Illustration of Luis reading a book

ethos.story: I clarify the problem and context before writing code.|I prefer sustainable architecture over clever but fragile solutions.|Speed matters when it comes with judgment, visibility and operational quality.

0.description: iOS and Android features for corporate spend, cards and travel on a multi-brand React Native architecture.

1.description: Feature delivery, stability work and incident response for Pago Facil and Western Union inside a PSP stack.

2.description: EventTech product work across bookings, ticketing, live operations and real-time interaction.

0.quote: Before optimizing a screen, I would rather understand which business rule cannot break and which experience must still feel simple.
0.author: Product clarity

1.quote: AI is useful when it turns repetitive work into consistent processes, not when it replaces technical judgment.
1.author: Speed with judgment

works.title: WORKS
works.intro: Real projects where the technical impact is easy to scan: product, contribution and outcome. The strongest cases appear first; the rest stay available to show range and trajectory.

Mendel.name: Mendel
Mendel.description: I build iOS and Android features for Mendel, a regional platform for corporate spend, cards and travel on top of a multi-brand, white-label React Native architecture.
Mendel.highlights: Ship cross-platform flows for budgets, transactions, PIN changes and physical or virtual card management.|Work inside a multi-brand architecture that avoids client-specific forks and supports regional growth.|Also build AI enablement to standardize scaffolding, review and testing for the mobile team.
Mendel.result: Impact: product used by 500+ companies across LATAM for corporate spend, cards and travel.

meta.role: Mobile & AI Developer · Expense & Travel Tech

Pago Fácil & Western Union.name: Pago Fácil & Western Union
Pago Fácil & Western Union.description: As a Mobile Developer at Bizland Tech, I contributed to a mission-critical PSP solution for Pago Facil and Western Union, with millions of downloads and real financial transactions in production.
Pago Fácil & Western Union.highlights: Architected the PSP integration layer for multiple wallets and providers with transaction reliability in mind.|Shipped production features and stability work with React Native, TypeScript, Redux and Firebase.|Handled P0 incidents and helped reduce crash rate by 40% through profiling and app hardening.
Pago Fácil & Western Union.result: Impact: 1.5M+ downloads, 500K monthly active users and stronger operational stability.

0-Registros.name: 0-Registros
0-Registros.description: A zero-to-one experimental platform combining poetry, generative visuals and technology in a bilingual experience built for live performance.
0-Registros.highlights: Designed an immersive narrative with adaptive layouts and curated typography.|Implemented p5.js scenes and real-time logic to support the performative layer of the project.|Deployed a bilingual base with simple authoring for exhibitions and iterative shows.

Hybeans App.name: Hybeans App
Hybeans App.description: Built Hybeans' main mobile experience for social interaction, ticketing and commerce during events with thousands of concurrent users.
Hybeans App.highlights: Architected end-to-end flows for auth, booking, real-time feeds and in-app checkout.|Built notifications, deep linking and analytics to cover the full user journey.|Shipped under hard live-operation deadlines alongside design, backend and QA.
Hybeans App.result: Impact: platform used during live events by thousands of attendees managing tickets, networking and purchases.

FastForm.name: FastForm
FastForm.description: I co-founded and engineered FastForm, a SaaS platform that cuts manual form creation from hours to minutes through automation and AI.
FastForm.highlights: Architected the whole product: AI chat, CSV parser, visual builder and draft flows.|Built the production app with Next.js, TypeScript and a deployment setup tuned for fast loads.|Integrated OpenAI, Google Forms, OAuth and billing to turn the idea into an end-to-end workflow.
FastForm.result: Impact: teams cut form creation time dramatically through auditable automations.

Push Notify.name: NOUS · Push Notify
Push Notify.description: Secure console for orchestrating mass push campaigns across the NOUS mobile ecosystem.
Push Notify.highlights: Implemented admin onboarding with service credentials and role-based permissions.|Added segmentation, scheduling and live delivery telemetry for campaigns.|Hardened Firebase Cloud Messaging pipelines with audit-ready logging and monitoring.
Push Notify.result: Impact: less manual operations and better control over mass messaging.

Filoweb.name: Filoweb
Filoweb.description: Educational experience for exploring the history of philosophy through interactive storytelling and modular content.
Filoweb.highlights: Designed narrative UX with timelines, author journeys and responsive layouts.|Improved accessibility and performance for classroom use on any device.|Structured publishing so new content could ship without touching the core site.
Filoweb.result: Impact: philosophy program sustained a yearly audience of thousands of readers.

Hybeans Web.name: Hybeans Web
Hybeans Web.description: Web extension of Hybeans focused on conversion, booking flows and personalization for the product's commercial layer.
Hybeans Web.highlights: Built booking flows with real-time availability, checkout and confirmations.|Designed customizable profiles with social features and team dashboards.|Optimized React bundles with lazy loading and code splitting to improve initial load.
Hybeans Web.result: Impact: stronger support for bookings and conversions inside the commercial funnel.

AEG Hornos de Cerámica.name: AEG Ceramic Ovens
AEG Hornos de Cerámica.description: Operations platform that unifies marketing site and CRM backoffice for specialized technicians.
AEG Hornos de Cerámica.highlights: Built a CRM with customer segmentation, pricing management and suggestion pipelines.|Integrated email editing, Resend API and WhatsApp automations in one operational panel.|Implemented validation, pagination and media handling to keep data quality under control.
AEG Hornos de Cerámica.result: Impact: centralized operations and reduced manual follow-up for the team.

highlights.title: Fast proof points
highlights.intro: Three quick signals for the kind of problems I solve: B2B FinTech product work, consumer scale and delivery accelerated with judgment.
